name: WNGRemove
notes: remove _curId from a wing; MSGSend 0x14 handoff (twin of GRPRemove)

name: WNGLeader
notes: first live member of a wing (twin of GRPLeader)

name: WNGWingman
notes: undetected twin of GRPWingman; materialized on apply

name: WNGWingmenNearby
notes: count wingmen within distance/alt (twin of GRPWingmenNearby)

name: WNGControl
notes: if wingman, optional FormationMove; return formControl (twin of GRPControl)

name: WNGSetControl
notes: set formation control; MSGSend subcode 10

name: WNGSetType
notes: set formation type; MSGSend subcode 9

name: WNGSetSpacingH
notes: set horizontal spacing; MSGSend subcode 7

name: WNGSetSpacingV
notes: set vertical spacing; MSGSend subcode 8

name: WNGSetStateTarget
notes: EnterState + set target; MSGSend 0x11 (twin of GRPSetStateTarget)
Ghidra split of _WNGSendWM@8 (0x45ED90) after the 10-byte stub

name: WNGResponseSize
notes: response capacity from the orders-block flags

name: WNGAttackingObj
notes: count wing members attacking a target

name: WNGHumansFirst
notes: move human-controlled members to slot 0

name: WNGInHumanWing
notes: true if id shares the player's wing

name: WNGName
notes: format 'Wingleader'/'Wingman'/'Wingman %d' (twin of GRPName)
